decision.reason: AWS Iceberg can represent the required table mechanics, but ContractForge has not certified Databricks/AWS parity for late-arriving changes, delete predicates, replay idempotency, validity-window closure and concurrent history updates.
decision.planner_behavior: Keep AWS planning at REVIEW_REQUIRED for historical and snapshot_reconcile_soft_delete. Do not silently fall back to append, overwrite or current-state merge.

required_before_promotion: Databricks/AWS parity contracts for historical initial load, changed-row wave, no-change replay and late-arriving updates.
Delete-expression parity for historical and snapshot soft-delete tombstones.
Iceberg audit evidence for expired/current row counts, validity windows and idempotent reruns.
Failure evidence for duplicate keys, null keys, overlapping validity windows and stale sequence policy.
Cost and Glue run evidence for representative production-sized history workloads.
acceptance: Stable-final AWS claims exclude historical and snapshot soft-delete until linked E2E parity evidence exists.
